title: Some--And Some
content:
Some have much, and some have more,
    Some are rich, and some are poor,
    Some have little, some have less,
    Some have not a cent to bless
    Their empty pockets, yet possess
    True riches in true happiness.
meaning:
This evocative piece by William Arthur Dunkerley (John Oxenham), titled "Some--And Some", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
